routeCities.name: Central
routeCities.note: Ferried in with an evening skyline and sea wind.

routeCities.name: Tsim Sha Tsui
routeCities.note: Walked the harbourfront slowly and stayed until the lights settled.

routeCities.name: Mong Kok
routeCities.note: Night market textures, bright signs, and pockets full of small memories.

summary.en: A starter trip log about ferry light, harbour air, and slow walks through bright streets.
summary.zh: 一篇示例旅行日志，记录海风、渡轮、夜色与慢慢走过的街道。

gallery.caption: A repeated placeholder image until the real trip gallery is ready.

routeCities.name: Shinjuku
routeCities.note: Started among neon density and late-night station rhythms.

routeCities.name: Shimokitazawa
routeCities.note: Spent the afternoon with records, cafes, and quiet side streets.

routeCities.name: Asakusa
routeCities.note: Closed the trip with temple bells and softer morning light.

summary.en: A sample route about city glow, record stores, and the slower corners inside a busy trip.
summary.zh: 一条示例路线，写城市灯光、唱片店，以及热闹旅行里那些更慢的角落。
